title: iria debilis
intro: Iria debilis, also known as Iresine herbstii or Iresine debilis, is a species of flowering plant in the amaranth family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Iria debilis include its ability to reduce inflammation and aid in wound healing, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of Iria debilis can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, allowing for various applications in the treatment of various health issues.
